fundamentals.summary: Curated subset (~50) of W3C CSS Color Module Level 4 named colors with hex values.
fundamentals.license_note: W3C CSS named colors are public-domain — names + hex values are spec-defined.

fundamentals.summary: Semantic UI palette (success/warning/error/info/neutral) with light/base/dark tiers per role. Tailwind-500-derived defaults.
fundamentals.license_note: Tailwind CSS is MIT-licensed; hex values are spec defaults, not branding marks.

fundamentals.summary: Tailwind CSS default palette (v3.x) — 22 hue families × 11 tiers (242 colors). MIT-licensed; the broad designer-curated palette LLMs reach for most often. Use for general UI, charts, and any artifact that needs >5 distinct hues.
fundamentals.license_note: Tailwind CSS is MIT-licensed; hex values are spec defaults. Source: tailwindcss.com/docs/customizing-colors v3.4.

_notes: Second fundamental category implementing MCHATAI_FUNDAMENTALS.md spec §8 (color-palettes). Shipped 2026-05-12 in Slice D. Surfaces v1: native_swift + wisdom_resource. Slice D+ (2026-05-13): mcp_tool read_color_palette added + tailwind-default palette appended (3rd palette, 242 colors) + runtime_global window.mchatai.colorPalette wired via MchataiMiniAppShellGenerator extension. Future surfaces deferred until consumers ask: prompt_token {{COLOR_PALETTE:id}}, skill_namespace 'color' (e.g. builtin.color.nearest).
